prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `305b1341`.
codex_response:
Implemented `305b1341` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: each legend row maps a primary marker color to a secondary fill color; the non-legend primary cells define a sparse parity marker inside a rectangle, and the output paints the one-cell-expanded rectangle with the secondary color plus the primary color on the marker parity. I used the Opus hint as a starting point but corrected its overlap claim in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_305b1341/notes.md#L1): the official examples only match when legend rows are applied in reverse order, so the top legend row has highest overwrite priority.

The main implementation is in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_305b1341/verifier.py#L6), with shared low-level region logic in [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_305b1341/helpers.py#L9) and the generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_305b1341/generator.py#L97). The generator stays on-family by keeping the 20x20 format, producing 2-3 legend pairs, varying between full-lattice and outline-like sparse markers, and biasing placements toward overlapping expanded rectangles so the reverse-priority behavior appears in the outputs. No new reusable primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. The generated artifacts are [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/305b1341/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/305b1341/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/305b1341/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/305b1341/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/305b1341/previews/preview_03.png). I also sanity-checked representative generated cases from the built corpus directly.
